plugins.description: Multi-language reachability analysis. Annotates VULN findings as REACH-001 (unreachable), REACH-002 (reachable), or REACH-003 (undetermined). Supports Go, PyPI, npm, Cargo, Maven, RubyGems, NuGet. Bundled by default in the nox release archive.
plugins.name: nox/reachability

plugins.description: Intraprocedural taint analysis tracking data flow from untrusted sources to dangerous sinks
plugins.name: nox/taint-analysis

plugins.description: Inspect running Kubernetes workloads for security misconfigurations
plugins.name: nox/k8s-runtime

plugins.description: AI-powered attack path analysis and exploit validation for security findings
plugins.name: nox/red-team

plugins.description: Governance, Risk & Compliance assessment with 10 framework coverage, gap analysis, and evidence collection
plugins.name: nox/grc

plugins.description: Adversarial prompt corpus runner. Fires a bundled jailbreak / prompt-leak / role-confusion corpus against a configured chat endpoint and reports which attacks succeeded.
plugins.name: nox/ai-eval

plugins.description: DAST web/API scanning with HTTP misconfig probes (headers, CORS, TLS, cookies, rate-limit, open-redirect)
plugins.name: nox/dast

plugins.description: Dockerfile linting + image vulnerability scanning + container SBOM (22 rules)
plugins.name: nox/container

plugins.description: [DEPRECATED] Policy evaluation and CI gate (pass/fail) — severity thresholds, rule allowlists, finding budgets (5 rules)
plugins.name: nox/policy-gate

plugins.deprecation_note: Superseded by core: nox baseline write/update/diff/migrate + nox vex
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED] Finding baseline snapshots, diff, triage — brownfield migration enabler (4 rules)
plugins.name: nox/baseline-mgmt

plugins.description: Dependency confusion detection across npm, PyPI, RubyGems, Maven (3 rules)
plugins.name: nox/depconfusion

plugins.description: CVE enrichment, CWE mapping, MITRE ATT&CK correlation (13 rules)
plugins.name: nox/threat-enrich

plugins.description: LLM-powered finding prioritization and false-positive reduction (4 rules + 7-provider LLM: openai, anthropic, gemini, ollama, cohere, bedrock, copilot)
plugins.name: nox/triage-agent

plugins.description: STRIDE-based threat pattern detection in source code; opt-in AI threat modeling via ai_model: true (5 rules + LLM)
plugins.name: nox/threat-model

plugins.description: LLM-enhanced finding explanations and impact analysis with audience targeting (8 rules + LLM)
plugins.name: nox/threat-explain

plugins.description: API authorization testing for BOLA, BFLA, rate-limit, and abuse patterns in server code (5 rules)
plugins.name: nox/api-abuse

plugins.description: Static endpoint extraction and exposure mapping across Go (net/http, Gin, Echo, Chi), Python (Flask, Django, FastAPI), and JavaScript/TypeScript (Express, Koa, Fastify) frameworks
plugins.name: nox/attack-surface

plugins.description: EPSS / KEV vulnerability prioritization and severity scoring with environmental risk amplification (5 rules)
plugins.name: nox/risk-score

plugins.description: Deterministic remediation planning and application for code findings
plugins.name: nox/remediate

plugins.description: Optional LLM second-opinion triage. Sends each finding plus a code snippet to a configured chat endpoint and attaches a true/false-positive verdict as an enrichment. Never gates the scan; the deterministic core is unaffected.
plugins.name: nox/llm-triage
